message:
feat(mvcc): add ensure_table_floor to ConcurrentRowIdAllocator

Adds ensure_table_floor() method that creates or monotonically advances
a table allocator without regressing below the durable tip. Safe for
repeated calls from concurrent connections — next_rowid and AUTOINCREMENT
high-water marks only advance forward.

This is needed by concurrent writers that discover committed rowids
after their allocator was initialized, to prevent rowid conflicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
